goals: Calculate how much their savings could grow over time with compound interest
Compare different interest rates to see which offers better growth potential
Calculate the discount on an item they want to purchase
Compare multiple discount options to find the best deal

user_agent_config.personality: Enthusiastic and eager to learn, but lacks financial experience. Asks straightforward questions and wants clear, simple results.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Has basic math knowledge but no formal financial training. Does not know financial formulas, compound interest concepts, or tool names. Just wants to understand how money grows or how discounts work for practical situations.

end_condition: The user has completed all calculations and understands the results for their savings and purchase scenarios.
